compiled_state.title: GREEN: Consolidate ticket-graph.py to single reduce_all_tickets call
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Refactor ticket-graph.py to use a single reduce_all_tickets call shared across _find_direct_blockers, _compute_dep_graph children scan, and _get_ticket_status:
(a) Add reduce_all_tickets call at the top of build_dep_graph (or _compute_dep_graph) that loads all non-archived tickets once
(b) Pass the pre-loaded ticket_states dict to _find_direct_blockers and _compute_dep_graph
(c) Replace per-ticket _reduce_ticket calls in Source 2 scan and children scan with lookups into pre-loaded dict
(d) _get_all_blocked_by remains unchanged (archived mid-chain traversal must work)
(e) Preserve compute_archive_eligible's exclude_archived=False
(f) Remove .test-index RED marker

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py
- .test-index (remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-graph.py
- [ ] .test-index RED marker removed
  Verify: ! grep -q 'ticket-graph.py.*\[test_build_dep_graph_single_batch_scan' .test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: ticket-graph.py consolidated to single reduce_all_tickets call
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
